Notice Of Motion And Motion In Support Of Pltf'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-28-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Plaintiff Ronald Crespo's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is moot as responses have been served. The court will not determine the adequacy of those responses on this motion. Late opposition has been considered. The court finds that the late responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Defendant in the amount of $1,090, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Comm. Everett A. Hewlett
